_comment: Per-path classification overrides for scripts/audit_runtime_inventory.py. Every entry needs path, classification (active|compat-shim|legacy-flag|archived|fixture), owner, and reason. Rule-based defaults in the audit cover archive/bench/test/bin/setup/unitrace/unifusion; this file explains the residue and any future legacy-flag entries.

entries.reason: thin UserPromptSubmit wrapper; body is exec python3 scripts/gate/pack_router.py, no Node/Bun
CI release commit helper; dev tooling, not shipped on a runtime path
pre-commit generated-docs refresh; dev tooling, not a runtime path
full verification suite runner; dev tooling, not a runtime path
supported gate-allowlisted websearch entrypoint; delegates to the unitrace implementation, targeted for Python port
